subtitle_path.description: Optional override path to the .srt to sync. Templated (supports {{ ... }}). Empty string means auto-discover from ctx.steps.

max_offset_seconds.description: Refuse to apply offsets above this magnitude. Sanity check; large offsets usually mean ffsubsync misidentified the speech.

framerate_correction.description: Allow ffsubsync to also fit a linear scale factor (helps PAL↔NTSC drift).

fail_on_no_match.description: Hard-fail vs. warn-and-pass on alignment failure. Default is warn-and-pass.
